messages.content: Wrap a service insert and audit log call in a transaction block for atomicity.
Coordinate writes to two repositories in a single atomic transaction.
Use a CFScript transaction block that auto-rolls back when an internal throw occurs.
Batch-insert an array of items wrapped in a single transaction for performance and atomicity.
Insert a record and immediately read back the generated identity ID within the same transaction.
Catch a database exception inside a transaction and rethrow as a user-safe application exception.
Wrap a FW/1 service method that performs composite data operations in a CFScript transaction block.
Verify a successful insert by reading the record back after the transaction commits.
